name: hybig-py
summary: Python package designed to produce browse imagery compatible with NASA's Global Image Browse Services (GIBS).
author_email: Matt Savoie <savoie@colorado.edu>, Owen Littlejohns <owen.m.littlejohns@nasa.gov>, Jacqueline Ryan <Jacqueline.Ryan@jpl.nasa.gov>, Mauricio Hess-Flores <Mauricio.A.Hess.Flores@jpl.nasa.gov>
